mapper.sql: o.id, o.emp_id, o.overtime_date, o.start_time, o.end_time, o.overtime_hours, o.overtime_type, o.reason, o.status, o.approver_id, o.approve_time, o.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT , e.emp_name, e.emp_no, d.dept_name, a.emp_name as approver_name FROM sys_overtime o LEFT JOIN sys_emp e ON o.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_emp a ON o.approver_id = a.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM sys_overtime o WHERE o.emp_id = #{empId} ORDER BY o.overtime_date DESC, o.create_time DESC

SELECT , e.emp_name, e.emp_no, d.dept_name FROM sys_overtime o LEFT JOIN sys_emp e ON o.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE o.status = 0 ORDER BY o.overtime_date ASC, o.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_overtime (emp_id, overtime_date, start_time, end_time, overtime_hours, overtime_type, reason, status) VALUES (#{empId}, #{overtimeDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{overtimeHours}, #{overtimeType}, #{reason}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_overtime WHERE status = #{status}
